items.title: @sentry now takes you from Seer's root-cause analysis to a Claude-powered agent that writes the…
items.content: @sentry now takes you from Seer's root-cause analysis to a Claude-powered agent that writes the fix and opens a PR. They built the integration on Managed Agents in weeks: https://t.co/kPd2qFH2IM
